div.div:
Keep useful, late, and polluting as separate evidence streams.
Arrange the controller as a hub fed by distributed sensors.

div.div:
The controller is a hub, not a pipeline stage.
Useful, late, and polluting observations arrive independently and meet only when the control policy is recomputed.
